'''tojadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labelloid|labelloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labelloid|labelloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tojadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojadithi|tojadithi]] || [[word:tojadiji|tojadiji]] || [[word:tojadishi|tojadishi]] || [[word:tojadiki|tojadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojaduthuthu|tojaduthuthu]] || [[word:tojadujuju|tojadujuju]] || [[word:tojadushushu|tojadushushu]] || [[word:tojadukuku|tojadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojaduthu|tojaduthu]] || [[word:tojaduju|tojaduju]] || [[word:tojadushu|tojadushu]] || [[word:tojaduku|tojaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojadufthuf|tojadufthuf]] || [[word:tojadufjuf|tojadufjuf]] || [[word:tojadufshuf|tojadufshuf]] || [[word:tojadufkuf|tojadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojadethe|tojadethe]] || [[word:tojadeje|tojadeje]] || [[word:tojadeshe|tojadeshe]] || [[word:tojadeke|tojadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojadothotho|tojadothotho]] || [[word:tojadojojo|tojadojojo]] || [[word:tojadoshosho|tojadoshosho]] || [[word:tojadokoko|tojadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojadotho|tojadotho]] || [[word:tojadojo|tojadojo]] || [[word:tojadosho|tojadosho]] || [[word:tojadoko|tojadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojadofthof|tojadofthof]] || [[word:tojadofjof|tojadofjof]] || [[word:tojadofshof|tojadofshof]] || [[word:tojadofkof|tojadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfthĂŻf|tojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfjĂŻf|tojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfshĂŻf|tojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfkĂŻf|tojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|tojadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|tojadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|tojadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|tojadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfthĂŻf|tojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfjĂŻf|tojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfshĂŻf|tojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfkĂŻf|tojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfthĂŻf|tojadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfjĂŻf|tojadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfshĂŻf|tojadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:tojadĂŻfkĂŻf|tojadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojadĂŠthĂŠ|tojadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tojadĂŠjĂŠ|tojadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tojadĂŠshĂŠ|tojadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tojadĂŠkĂŠ|tojadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojadathatha|tojadathatha]] || [[word:tojadajaja|tojadajaja]] || [[word:tojadashasha|tojadashasha]] || [[word:tojadakaka|tojadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojadatha|tojadatha]] || [[word:tojadaja|tojadaja]] || [[word:tojadasha|tojadasha]] || [[word:tojadaka|tojadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojadafthaf|tojadafthaf]] || [[word:tojadafjaf|tojadafjaf]] || [[word:tojadafshaf|tojadafshaf]] || [[word:tojadafkaf|tojadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tojadasha|tojadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojadshĂ«sha|tojadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojadrosha|tojadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojadmusha|tojadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojadyasha|tojadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojadnkshĂ«sha|gotojadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojadnkrosha|gotojadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojadnkmusha|gotojadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojadnkyasha|gotojadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tojajadasha|tojajadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojajadshĂ«sha|tojajadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojajadrosha|tojajadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojajadmusha|tojajadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojajadyasha|tojajadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojajadnkshĂ«sha|gotojajadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojajadnkrosha|gotojajadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojajadnkmusha|gotojajadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojajadnkyasha|gotojajadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tejĂŠdasha|tejĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tejĂŠdshĂ«sha|tejĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tejĂŠdrosha|tejĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tejĂŠdmusha|tejĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tejĂŠdyasha|tejĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotejĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gotejĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotejĂŠdnkrosha|gotejĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotejĂŠdnkmusha|gotejĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotejĂŠdnkyasha|gotejĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tojfadasha|tojfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojfadshĂ«sha|tojfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojfadrosha|tojfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojfadmusha|tojfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojfadyasha|tojfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojfadnkshĂ«sha|gotojfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojfadnkrosha|gotojfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojfadnkmusha|gotojfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojfadnkyasha|gotojfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
